## What does this change?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the change and the motivation. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `make test` and the full suite is green
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change (TDD — test first)
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `mypy cc_autoswitch.py` pass locally
- [ ] Updated docs (README / docs/) if behaviour or config changed
- [ ] Linux-only scope respected (no macOS/Windows-specific code)
- [ ] Describes any behaviour change to the switch decision

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
